items.title: Some quick in-flight analysis:
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Some quick in-flight analysis:

🏀Thunder are now below the second apron. Plenty of wiggle room without going back over the second apron. OKC will create a $17.7M TPE for Dort.

🏀Hawks are ~$4M under the luxury tax after taking on Lu Dort for Zaccharie Risacher.

1/2

items.body_excerpt: Forget the cash savings (which will be significant), it was simply time for OKC to move on from Lu Dort. JDub can assume the bigger wing defensive assignments. items.title: Hollander POTD Alvan Adams. Oklahoma C was drafted 4th by PHO in 75. Won ROY, was all-star, & led team to Finals that year. Remained solid for 12 yrs in PHO but never quite that good again (career 14.1 ppg, 7.0 rpg). Still was PHO fan fave and had a nice career.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollander POTD Alvan Adams. Oklahoma C was drafted 4th by PHO in 75. Won ROY, was all-star, & led team to Finals that year. Remained solid for 12 yrs in PHO but never quite that good again (career 14.1 ppg, 7.0 rpg). Still was PHO fan fave and had a nice career.
